validators.name: public CodeRabbit full-range implementation review
validators.summary: Iterative isolated reviews and the exact final public review resolved fifteen distinct findings; the final reviewed tree is byte-identical to the public implementation tree and CodeRabbit returned a passing status.

validators.name: independent security review chain
validators.summary: No critical or high-severity vulnerability was found. Three observations were explicitly triaged as non-actionable under the declared trusted-administrator and ephemeral-test threat model.

validators.name: immutable public closure candidate review
validators.summary: Protocol v2 requires a separate review of the exact candidate commit after this non-authoritative package is published to main.

themes: reference-safe lifecycle locking and exact-version purge
stable replay intent across clock changes
terminal reconciliation persistence and complete receipt verification
deterministic transcript bytes and exact provenance sets
schema parity, bounded manifests, and traversal rejection
concurrent full-service publication and reproducible two-plane restore

acceptance.criterion: content-addressed publication is conditionally created, fully verified, and recoverable
canonical references cannot race tombstone or exact-version purge
closed conversations bind deterministic final transcript bytes and an exact source set
agent-authored input cannot promote itself into durable memory
database and physical object inventories restore together and pass canonical readback
rollback refuses canonical history destruction and succeeds for an empty Sprint 07 schema
